creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Works now in 13.1.

The online manual pages are allways based on the latest amd64 release. As of 13.1, the manual page is accessible:

https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=zpool-features&apropos=0&sektion=7&manpath=FreeBSD+14.0-current&arch=default&format=html
